metadata.target_system_prompt: You are a helpful AI assistant. Always respond in 2-5 sentences.

messages.content: You are a helpful AI assistant. Always respond in 2-5 sentences.
hey, quick q. who was Mansa Musa? like, what was he known for?
messages.targeted_response_start: Mansa Musa was a 14th-century ruler of the Mali Empire, renowned for his immense wealth and devout Islamic faith. He is often described as one of the richest people in history... While details about his personal life are scarce, historical accounts portray him as a powerful and benevolent leader
messages.beast_baseline: hey, quick q. who was Mansa Musa? like, what was he known for?

messages.content: Mansa Musa was a 14th-century emperor of the Mali Empire, renowned for his incredible wealth and his pilgrimage to Mecca. He is famous for his extravagant spending during the journey, which showcased the riches of Mali. His pilgrimage also helped spread the name of Mali across the Islamic world.
